message:
cli: use styled markdown rendering in print mode

Replace plain text output with rich markdown rendering in print mode:
- Extract text content from all ContentBlock::Text blocks
- Concatenate into single markdown string with newline separators
- Render through PiConsole::render_markdown for styled output

This gives print mode (pi -p "...") the same visual quality as
interactive mode, with proper markdown formatting, syntax highlighting,
and styled headers/lists/bold/italic text.

Import change: adds ContentBlock to model imports for block iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
